title: Charlemagne becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Charlemagne was King of the Franks from 768, King of the Lombards from 774, and Emperor of what is now known as the Carolingian Empire from 800.

title: Charles V becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Charles V was Holy Roman Emperor and Archduke of Austria from 1519 to 1556, King of Spain from 1516 to 1556, King of Sicily and Naples from 1516 to 1554, and also Lord of the Netherlands and titular Duke of Burgundy from 1506 to 1555.

title: Francis II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Francis II and I was the last Holy Roman Emperor as Francis II from 1792 to 1806, and the first Emperor of Austria as Francis I from 1804 to 1835.

title: Sigismund becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Sigismund of Luxembourg was Holy Roman Emperor from 1433 until his death in 1437.

title: Frederick II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Frederick II was King of Sicily from 1198, King of Germany from 1212, King of Italy and Holy Roman Emperor from 1220, and King of Jerusalem from 1225 to 1228.

title: Frederick Barbarossa becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Frederick Barbarossa, also known as Frederick I, was the Holy Roman emperor from 1155 until his death in 1190.

title: Maximilian I becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Maximilian I was King of the Romans from 1486 and Holy Roman Emperor from 1508 until his death in 1519.

title: Joseph II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Joseph II was Holy Roman Emperor from 18 August 1765 and sole ruler of the Habsburg monarchy from 29 November 1780 until his death.

title: Leopold I, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Leopold I was Holy Roman Emperor, King of Germany, King of Hungary, Croatia, and Bohemia.

title: Ferdinand I, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Ferdinand I was Holy Roman Emperor from 1556, King of Bohemia, Hungary, and Croatia from 1526, and Archduke of Austria from 1521 until his death in 1564.

title: Francis I, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Francis I was Holy Roman Emperor from 1745 to 1765, Archduke of Austria from 1740 to 1765, Duke of Lorraine and Bar from 1729 to 1737, and Grand Duke of Tuscany from 1737 to 1765.

title: Leopold II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Leopold II was the penultimate Holy Roman Emperor, as well as King of Hungary, Croatia and Bohemia, and Archduke of Austria from 1790 to 1792, and Grand Duke of Tuscany from 1765 to 1790.

title: Charles IV becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Charles IV was Holy Roman Emperor from 1355 until his death in 1378.

title: Charles VI, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Charles VI was Holy Roman Emperor and ruler of the Austrian Habsburg monarchy from 1711 until his death, succeeding his elder brother, Joseph I.

title: Charles the Bald becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Charles the Bald was king of West Francia (843–77), king of Italy (875–77) and emperor of the Carolingian Empire (875–77).

title: Frederick III, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Frederick III was Holy Roman emperor from 1452 until his death in 1493.

title: Otto I the Great becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Otto I, known as Otto the Great or Otto of Saxony, was East Frankish (German) king from 936 and Holy Roman Emperor from 962 until his death in 973.

title: Ferdinand II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Ferdinand II was Holy Roman Emperor, King of Bohemia, Hungary, and Croatia from 1619 until his death in 1637.

title: Emperor Rudolf II becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Rudolf II was Holy Roman Emperor (1576–1612), King of Hungary and Croatia, King of Bohemia (1575–1608/1611) and Archduke of Austria (1576–1608).

title: Henry IV becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Henry IV was Holy Roman Emperor (1084–1105), King of Germany (1054–1105), and King of Italy and Burgundy (1056–1105).

title: Ferdinand III, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Ferdinand III was Archduke of Austria, King of Hungary and Croatia from 1625, King of Bohemia from 1627 and Holy Roman Emperor from 1637 to his death.

title: Maximilian II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Maximilian II was Holy Roman Emperor from 1564 until his death in 1576.

title: Henry VI becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Henry VI, a member of the Hohenstaufen dynasty, was King of Germany from 1169 and Holy Roman Emperor from 1191 until his death.

title: Joseph I, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Joseph I was Holy Roman Emperor and ruler of the Habsburg monarchy from 1705 until his death in 1711.

title: Charles VII, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Charles VII was elector of Bavaria from 26 February 1726 and Holy Roman Emperor from 24 January 1742 to his death.

title: Matthias, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Matthias was Holy Roman Emperor from 1612 to 1619, Archduke of Austria from 1608 to 1619, King of Hungary and Croatia from 1608 to 1618 and King of Bohemia from 1611 to 1617.

title: Louis IV of Bavaria becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Louis IV, called the Bavarian, was King of the Romans from 1314, King of Italy from 1327, and Holy Roman Emperor from 1328 until his death in 1347.

title: Henry II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Henry II, also known as Saint Henry, Obl.

title: Henry VII, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Henry VII, also known as Henry of Luxembourg, King of Germany and King of Italy numbering is Heinrich VIII, was Count of Luxembourg, King of Germany from 1308 and Holy Roman Emperor from 1312.

title: Henry V becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Henry V was King of Germany and Holy Roman Emperor, as the fourth and last ruler of the Salian dynasty.

title: Henry III becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Henry III, called Heinrich the Pious, was Holy Roman Emperor from 1046 until his death in 1056.

title: Otto III becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Otto III was the Holy Roman emperor and King of Italy from 996 until his death in 1002.

title: Otto II becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Otto II, called the Red, was Holy Roman Emperor from 973 until his death in 983.

title: Conrad II becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Conrad II, also known as Conrad the Elder and Conrad the Salic, was the emperor of the Holy Roman Empire from 1027 until his death in 1039.

title: Berengar I of Italy becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Berengar I was King of Italy from 887 and Holy Roman Emperor from 915 until his death in 924.

title: Otto IV, Holy Roman Emperor becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Otto IV was the Holy Roman Emperor from 1209 until his death in 1218.

title: Guy III of Spoleto becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Guy III of Spoleto was King of Italy since 889, and Emperor since 891.

title: Louis the Blind becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Louis the Blind was king in Provence and Lower Burgundy from 890 to 928, and also king of Italy from 900 to 905, and also the emperor between 901 and 905, styled as Louis III.

title: Lothair III becomes Holy Roman Emperor
fact: Lothair III, sometimes numbered Lothair II and also known as Lothair of Supplinburg, was Holy Roman Emperor from 1133 until his death.
